name: Cheese Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cheddar cheese.
2. Gradually add beer to the grated cheese while mixing until fluffy.
3. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, mustard, garlic powder, and Tabasco sauce; mix well.
4. Place the mixture over a low flame on the stove, stirring constantly.
5. Mix cornstarch with water, then stir it into the cheese mixture.
6. Cook and stir until thick and bubbly. Reheat before serving if prepared in advance.
7. Serves 4.
